hero.eyebrow: ⚡ ASK EMPOWER V2 — INTERNAL LAUNCH BRIEF
hero.title:
Your company's conversations,
finally intelligent.
hero.sub: Ask Empower V2 transforms Empower from a single-call chatbot into a company-wide conversational intelligence engine — the foundation of Ringover's Revenue Intelligence platform.

evo.label: The Journey
evo.title: How Ask Empower evolved
evo.sub: From single-call chatbot → company conversational intelligence → full revenue operating system

v1.title: Single-Call Assistant
v1.li1: Limited to 1 call ID at a time
v1.li4: Basic Q&A on individual call content

v2.title: Company-Wide Intelligence
v2.li2: Ask about any conversation, any time
v2.li3: Trend analysis, objections, performance at scale
v2.li5: Multilingual: EN, FR, ES, DE, IT + more

future.title: Revenue Intelligence OS
future.li6: Competes with Gong at full scale

1.title: Company-Wide Conversation Search
1.desc: Ask questions across your entire call and meeting library. Search by agent, team, tag, topic, date range, or client name.

2.title: Cross-Agent Performance Analysis
2.desc: Compare rep performance, identify top performers, surface coaching gaps, and track skill progression across your team.

3.title: Trend & Pattern Detection
3.desc: Spot objection trends month over month, track competitor mentions, identify recurring customer pain points at scale.

4.title: Account & Contact Intelligence
4.desc: Get full context on any account or contact — full call history, pain points, objections, and next steps before you call.

5.title: Tag-Based Intelligence
5.desc: Analyse calls by custom tags (Prospect, Demo, Objection, Competitor). Understand what's happening inside any call segment.

6.title: Multi-Channel Coverage
6.desc: Ringover calls, Zoom, Google Meet, MS Teams, physical meetings, Aircall, RingCentral, or any call via public upload API.

7.title: CRM Auto-Sync
7.desc: Call summaries and action items sync to CRM today. CRM auto-fill (field enrichment) for calls AND video meetings ships April 2026.

8.title: AI-Generated Coaching Content
8.desc: Generate coaching plans, identify MEDDIC/SPIN/BANT gaps per rep, build demo scripts from top performer call data.

9.title: Follow-Up & Email Generation
9.desc: Generate contextual follow-up emails, client summaries, meeting prep briefs, and next-step plans from real conversation data.

cap.label: What's New
cap.title: Ask Empower V2 — Core Capabilities
cap.sub: Everything V1 could do, plus an entirely new layer of cross-company intelligence

uc.label: By Persona
uc.title: Who uses Ask Empower V2, and how
uc.sub: Real questions from real users — show prospects exactly what a day with Ask Empower V2 looks like

rep.q2v: → Full account intelligence before you dial

mgr.role: Team oversight, pipeline visibility, rep development

1.title: Insurance & Financial Services
1.subtitle: COMPLIANCE + CLIENT INTELLIGENCE
1.pitch: High-volume, compliance-sensitive environments where every call needs to be documented, searchable, and auditable. Empower transforms call archives into structured client intelligence.
1.q1: Give me all calls with SPVIE ASSURANCES and their next steps
1.q2: What objections came up in renewal calls in January?
1.q3: How has pricing feedback changed over the last quarter?
1.q4: Show calls where "contract" was mentioned with negative sentiment

2.title: B2B SaaS / Technology Sales
2.subtitle: DEAL INTELLIGENCE + COMPETITIVE AWARENESS
2.pitch: Fast-moving sales cycles where reps need instant context, managers need pipeline visibility, and enablement needs to scale best practices faster than headcount grows.
2.q1: Is there any mention of Aircall or Modjo in calls this week?
2.q2: What are the main features requested by enterprise clients?
2.q3: Budget identified but no next steps in the last 7 days — show me
2.q4: Compare Josua and Othmane's demo performance month over month

3.title: Recruitment & Staffing
3.subtitle: CANDIDATE INTELLIGENCE + ATS SYNC
3.pitch: Recruiters conduct dozens of calls per week. Empower turns those conversations into structured candidate profiles, synced to ATS — no manual note-taking required.
3.q1: Summarize all calls with this candidate and highlight fit signals
3.q2: Which candidates mentioned salary above our range?
3.q3: Generate a candidate brief for the client from my interview
3.q4: What are recruiter performance trends this month?

ind.label: By Industry
ind.title: Industry-specific value propositions
ind.sub: Tailor the pitch to your prospect's world

1.name: vs Modjo
1.desc: Modjo is Empower's closest European competitor in conversation intelligence.
1.where1: Strong CRM auto-fill and sales methodology alignment
1.where4: Strong European brand in RevOps teams
1.li1: ✔ We are the phone system. Modjo integrates with telephony — Empower is the telephony.
1.li2: ✔ 100% call capture. Empower captures every phone call + meeting.
1.li3: ✔ Multi-vertical. Modjo = sales only. Empower = sales + support + recruitment.
1.li4: ✔ Analyse conversations without recording. Empower can analyze calls and meetings even when recording is disabled.
1.li5: ✔ CRM automation catching up. Auto-fill for calls — video coverage coming April.
1.li6: ✔ Lower barrier. Modjo requires ~15 seats minimum.
1.pitch: Pitch: "Everything Modjo does — inside your phone system."

2.name: vs Fathom
2.desc: Fathom is an AI meeting assistant, not a conversation intelligence platform. Records meetings only, mainly Zoom.
2.where2: Very popular with individual sales reps
2.li1: ✔ Meetings vs conversations. Fathom analyzes meetings. Empower analyzes all conversations across phone + video.
2.li2: ✔ Organization intelligence. Fathom = meeting-by-meeting. Empower = cross-team intelligence.
2.li3: ✔ Telephony native. Fathom has no phone system.
2.li4: ✔ No-recording analysis. Empower can analyze conversations without recording calls.
2.li5: ✔ Operational intelligence. Empower answers: top performers, objection trends, coaching gaps, deal signals. Fathom cannot.
2.pitch: Pitch: "Fathom records meetings. Empower understands your entire conversation business."

3.name: vs Claap
3.desc: Claap is a meeting-based sales intelligence platform, now part of Lemlist.
3.li1: ✔ Phone calls missing. Claap depends on Zoom / Meet / Teams. Empower captures 100% of conversations.
3.pitch: Pitch: "Claap analyzes meetings. Empower analyzes your entire conversation stack."

4.name: vs Noota / Leexi / Fireflies / Read.ai
4.desc: These tools are primarily AI meeting assistants and note-takers.
4.li1: ✔ Meeting tools vs conversation intelligence. They answer "What happened in this meeting?" Empower answers "What is happening across our entire organization?"
4.li2: ✔ Organization-level intelligence. Ask Empower analyzes trends, coaching gaps, objections, performance across months of conversations.
4.li3: ✔ Telephony-native. They rely on bots, meeting capture, uploads. Empower is built into telephony.
4.li4: ✔ Analyse calls even without recording. Empower can extract insights without requiring call recordings.
4.li5: ✔ Cross-team analytics. They focus on individual meetings. Empower focuses on company-level intelligence.
4.pitch: Pitch: "Those tools write meeting notes. Empower tells you what your conversations mean."

5.name: vs Smart Note-Takers
5.desc: e.g. tl;dv, Otter, Granola, Notta, Fireflies, Read.ai
5.li1: ✔ Built for individual productivity — no team performance intelligence
5.pitch: Pitch: "AI note-takers capture meetings. Empower captures your business conversations."

6.name: vs Gong
6.desc: Gong is the revenue intelligence category leader.
6.li1: ✔ Cost. Gong deployments often exceed $100k+ per year.
6.li2: ✔ Time to value. Gong implementations take months. Empower works day one.
6.li3: ✔ Native telephony. Gong requires integrations. Empower is built inside communications.
6.li4: ✔ Multi-vertical. Gong = sales. Empower = sales + support + recruitment.
6.li6: ✔ Conversation intelligence foundation. Empower focuses on conversations, coaching, patterns, operational intelligence.
6.pitch: Pitch: "Gong is a revenue intelligence platform. Empower is the conversational intelligence foundation."

7.name: vs Dialpad / Aircall / CloudCall
7.desc: These are telephony platforms, not conversation intelligence platforms.
7.li1: ✔ AI add-on vs AI platform. Their AI = limited call summaries.
7.li2: ✔ No cross-conversation intelligence: coaching, trends, performance, objections.
7.li3: ✔ No conversational AI layer. Ask Empower enables data queries, insights, trend analysis.
7.li4: ✔ No multi-channel conversation stack. Empower analyzes calls, meetings, uploaded recordings.
7.li5: ✔ Conversation intelligence without recording. Empower can analyze conversations even when recordings are disabled.
7.pitch: Pitch: "Dialpad and Aircall give you calls. Empower tells you what those calls mean."

comp.label: Competitive Positioning
comp.title: How to win against the market
comp.sub: Scroll for all competitors — Where they're strong, Silver bullets, Pitch line to win
comp.strategicText: Empower is the only platform combining telephony + conversation intelligence + AI assistant in one system. Competitors usually provide one of the three.
comp.norecordText: Empower can analyse both audio and video calls without recording them — very useful for sensitive industries where call recording is forbidden.
comp.moatHeading: 🛡️ Empower's Structural Moat — Lead with this in every pitch

moat1.title: Native Telephony
moat1.desc: Every competitor integrates with a phone tool. Empower IS the phone tool — 100% capture, zero setup.

moat2.title: European Data
moat2.desc: GDPR-compliant, EU data residency, multilingual transcription and analysis by design.

moat3.title: Multi-Vertical
moat3.desc: Sales + Support + Recruitment. One platform, three teams, one subscription.

moat4.title: Price Accessible
moat4.desc: No $50K platform fees. No 15-seat minimums. Real value from day one, at any team size.

pitch.label: Sales Pitch
pitch.title: What to say — and how to say it
pitch.sub: Handle every prospect scenario with confidence
pitch.30secText: "Ask Empower V2 is your company's conversational intelligence engine. Instead of searching through recordings, you simply ask — about a client, a rep, a deal, a trend, an objection. It answers from the full history of your team's calls and meetings. Your sales reps close faster, your managers coach smarter, and your entire team stops losing context between conversations."
pitch.qa1a: Yes. Call summaries and action items sync to your CRM today for both calls and video meetings. CRM auto-fill (field enrichment) for both calls and video meetings ships in April 2026. Full bi-directional sync is on our roadmap.
pitch.qa2a: Fathom has Deal View, CRM sync, and coaching scorecards — don't call it "just a notetaker." Win on coverage and adoption: they only record Zoom/Meet/Teams when the user is present and can't ingest external recordings. Position Ask Empower V2 as the next step when they need intelligence across the full calls + meetings world and the whole organisation — especially if telephony is central (prospecting, inbound, screening).
pitch.qa3a: Fireflies has AskFred and conversation intelligence (topics, sentiment, trends). Differentiate on scope: position Ask Empower V2 as company-wide conversational intelligence for customer-facing teams (sales/support/recruitment), not just a meeting database. If they're on Ringover, one system beats meeting bot + separate phone platform. Don't claim Fireflies has no analytics — differentiate on calls + meetings and operational questions from the full conversation stack.
pitch.qa4a: They care about structured docs, ATS/CRM automation, and EU security. Discovery: Is workflow primarily sales, recruitment, or support? Do they need telephony capture or only meetings? Win: Recruitment-led — multi-channel capture (calls + meetings), coaching, manager visibility. Sales-led — telephony-native capture and Ask Empower V2's company-wide intelligence (patterns, blockers, objections); treat ATS-style scorecards as table stakes.
pitch.qa5a: They chose EU security (France-hosted, GDPR, ISO 27001) and integrations (Leexi lists Ringover, Aircall, HubSpot). Win: Consolidation — Empower reduces stack complexity, one data governance story, and moves beyond after-call notes to org-wide conversational intelligence. In Ringover accounts: if they already pay for telephony, Empower adds intelligence without another integration to maintain.
pitch.qa6a: Modjo is a good tool — but it integrates with your phone system. Empower is your phone system. 100% call capture, natively. Lower cost, no seat minimums, covering sales, support, and recruitment.
pitch.qa7a: Empower works standalone. Native integrations with Aircall and RingCentral. Any other call system can push via our public upload API. No need to switch phone providers.
pitch.disc1text: "When a rep finishes a call, how long does it take them to update the CRM and write a follow-up?"
pitch.disc2text: "If I asked you right now what the top 5 objections your team heard last month were — could you answer in 30 seconds?"
pitch.disc3text: "How do you currently identify which reps need coaching — and what triggers that conversation?"
pitch.disc4text: "How do you currently detect when a customer is at churn risk — before they tell you?"
pitch.disc5text: "After a candidate call, how long does it take your team to write up notes and update the ATS?"
pitch.warnText:
Do not position Empower as a revenue intelligence or forecasting tool yet. Do not promise that Ask Empower can accurately predict deal probability, pipeline health, or forecast accuracy — this requires CRM data not yet connected.

The right framing: "Empower is the conversational intelligence foundation that revenue intelligence is built on. We're building it phase by phase — and Phase 4 (full CRM sync) lands in April 2026."

footer.text: Ask Empower V2 — Internal Sales Enablement · Empower by Ringover · March 2026 · Confidential
